Configuration for Dependabot to update GitHub Actions monthly on Mondays at 16:00 UTC.

# Purpose
The file configures automated updates for GitHub Actions. It specifies that the update process should occur monthly on Mondays at 16:00 UTC. The updates apply to the package ecosystem identified as `github-actions` and are executed in the root directory `/`.
